description: Default window — no --since flag resolves to last 24 hours

snippets: Parallel subagents reduce latency by 60% compared to sequential execution for multi-source research tasks. Each subagent runs independently with its own context window, and results are merged in the parent skill.
Subagent batching is critical: 3-5 subagents per source type, 10-20 items each. One subagent per item causes excessive overhead and should be avoided.
Make sure subagents have independent scopes. Shared state between subagents causes blocking and eliminates the parallelism benefit entirely.
